extracted_text:
PRODUCT NAME: Liebig Condenser 250mm

SPECIFICATIONS:
- Jacket Length: 250 mm
- Joint Size: 24/29 interchangeable ground glass joints
- Outer Jacket Connection: Glass serrated tubulations for cooling water hose
- Core: Straight inner tube through which distillate flows

MATERIAL:
- Manufactured exclusively from high-quality Borosilicate Glass 3.3 conforming to ISO 3585.
- Chemical resistance Class S1/A1 to ensure maximum performance under thermal stress.

DIMENSIONS:
- Overall length: approximately 400 mm
- Tube diameter: outer jacket 28 mm, inner tube 14 mm

APPLICATIONS:
- Designed for laboratory distillation systems.
- Ideal for organic synthesis reflux experiments.
- Used as standard laboratory glassware apparatus.
